title: Dont Look Now But Bulker Fleet Growth Is About To Crash To 20 Year Lows
section_path: Dont Look Now But Bulker Fleet Growth Is About To Crash To 20 Year Lows
section_path_text: Dont Look Now But Bulker Fleet Growth Is About To Crash To 20 Year Lows
summary:
Main
The past decade has been quite challenging (to say the least) for dry bulk, as the ordering frenzy of the late 2000s had a meaningful impact on fleet growth in the early years of the decade outpacing demand growth by a wide margin and pushing fleet utilization to low levels. The dry bulk fleet almost doubled from 2000 to 2010, and it went to further increase by another 70% from 2010 to 2020. Although weak freight rates also led to higher scrapping with about 25% of the fleet ending up in scrapyards during the decade, that was no match for the significant growth in new deliveries.
